name: Poached Halibut Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chicken broth or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe each fillet with a paper towel, then cut in half lengthwise and roll up each piece.
2. Place the butter in a 9-inch microwave-safe pie plate and melt at high for 1 minute.
3. Add the chicken broth or white wine, garlic, tarragon or basil, Dijon mustard, tomatoes, and sugar to the melted butter.
4. Cover and cook for 5 minutes at high, stirring well.
5. Place the fish rolls side by side in the dish and baste with the sauce.
6. Cook for an additional 8 minutes at medium-high, basting with juice halfway through the cooking time.
7. Remove the fish with a perforated spoon and place it in a warm dish.
8. To the remaining sauce in the cooking dish, add the heavy cream and paprika; stir.
9. Cook for 4 minutes at high, stirring once.
10. Pour the sauce over the fish and serve.
